Simple Process

How It Works

Three simple steps to unlock luxury hotel savings across East Africa

1

Subscribe

Choose your plan and get coupon credits to unlock exclusive hotel deals.

2

Contact Hotel

Use your coupon to get hotel contact details and negotiate directly with partner hotels.

3

Save Big

Enjoy luxury stays at unbeatable member rates — up to 40% off rack rates.
